Open-by-default indicator.question: Where should the open-by-default indicator appear?
Open-by-default indicator.answer: Left of icon — filled/empty dot (●/○) before the icon

Status bar feedback.question: How should activation feedback be shown?
How verbose should activation messages be?

Bulk open (O) behavior.question: Sequential or concurrent?
Bulk open (O) behavior.answer: Sequential — one at a time in display order

Bulk open (O) behavior.question: What happens on failure?
Bulk open (O) behavior.answer: Continue, report at end — all successful opens proceed, error toast for failures

Bulk open (O) behavior.question: What feedback does O show?
Bulk open (O) behavior.answer: One toast per object — consistent with single-object feedback
